zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Cotton於1420年6月9日出生在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德時，他的父親Walter Cotton31歲，母親Joan Reade40歲。他於1429年與Alice Anne Abbott在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年5月22日在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年34歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可藍德瓦德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Cotton于1420年6月9日出生在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德时，他的父亲Walter Cotton31岁，母亲Joan Reade40岁。他于1429年与Alice Anne Abbott在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年5月22日在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年34岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可藍德瓦德。

nameMeanings.name: Cotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

variants.name: Cotten
meanings: Altered form of German Kotten, a habitational name from any of several places so named in Rhineland, Westphalia, Silesia, etc., or perhaps an American shortened form of composite German surnames such as Kottenhagen, Kottenhoff, Kottenkamp (see Koth ).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Cotham
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cottam
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): variant of   Cotton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Cotton was born on 9 June 1420, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Walter Cotton, was 31 and his mother, Joan Reade, was 40. He married Alice Anne Abbott in 1429, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 22 May 1455, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Landwade, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Cotton est né le 9 juin 1420, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Cotton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Reade, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice Anne Abbott en 1429, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1455, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Landwade, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Cotton am 9. Juni 1420 in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Cotton 31 und seine Mutter Joan Reade 40. Er hat 1429 in London, England Alice Anne Abbott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1455 im Alter von 34 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Landwade, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cotton è nato il il 9 giugno 1420 nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Cotton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Reade, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alice Anne Abbott nel 1429, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1455, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Landwade, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cottonが1420年6月9日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドで生まれた時，父Walter Cottonは31歳，母Joan Readeは40歳であった。1429年にイギリスロンドンでAlice Anne Abbottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年5月22日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで34歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクランドワドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cotton(이)가 1420년 6월 9일 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Cotton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Reade(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 런던에서 Alice Anne Abbott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 5월 22일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 랜드웨이드에 묻혔다.

pt.9 June 1420–22 May 1455: 9 de junho de 1420–22 de maio de 1455
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cotton nasceu em 9 de junho de 1420, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Cotton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Reade, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Anne Abbott em 1429, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1455, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Landwade, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Cotton родился 9 июня 1420 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Cotton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Reade, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Anne Abbott в 1429 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 22 мая 1455 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности ландвад, суффолк, Англия.

es.9 June 1420–22 May 1455: 9 de junio de 1420–22 de mayo de 1455
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Cotton nació el 9 de junio de 1420, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Cotton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Reade, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alice Anne Abbott en 1429, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1455, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Landwade, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
